india_trends.title: Bandhan Bank Q4 profit surges as asset quality improves and NPAs fall
india_trends.summary: Bandhan Bank reported a strong quarterly profit jump driven by lower provisions and improved asset quality. Gross NPAs declined significantly, margins improved, and loan growth remained steady, while the bank also strengthened its secured lending portfolio and deposit base.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: Rare Earths Americas kicks off US IPO roadshow with $368 million valuation target
india_trends.summary: Rare Earths ‌Americas kicked off ⁠the roadshow ⁠for its U.S. initial public offering on Tuesday, aiming for a valuation of up to $368.4 million, as ​investor interest surges in critical minerals used in products from electric vehicles to iPhones.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: Barrick names top executives at new North American business post IPO
india_trends.summary: Barrick Mining named Wessel Hamman as ‌chief financial ⁠officer of ⁠the new company that will hold its North American assets after its IPO, adding ​on Tuesday that Tim Cribb will serve as chief operating officer.

india_trends.title: GRSE Q4 results: PAT jumps 24% YoY to Rs 303 crore on 29% revenue uptick; recommends Rs 6.70/share dividend
india_trends.summary: Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers reported strong Q4FY26 growth with net profit rising to ₹303 crore and revenue surging 29 percent. Higher EBITDA, improved margins, and record operational output supported performance, while the board recommended a final dividend for shareholders.

india_trends.title: KSDL clocks Rs 507 crore profit in FY26, revenue up at Rs 2,016 crore
india_trends.summary: Karnataka Soaps and Detergents Limited reported strong growth with ₹507 crore profit and ₹2016 crore revenue, driven by expansion, product diversification, and efficient operations. The Mysore Sandal brand crossed the ₹2000 crore milestone, marking rapid scaling and improved profitability.

Nvidia shares rebound over 24% in April, hit record highs on AI optimism ahead of earnings
india_trends.summary: Nvidia's stock has bounced back 24% in April, driven by optimism in AI following positive earnings from tech leaders. Major investments in AI infrastructure by big tech firms are expected to further boost demand for Nvidia's chips, with a promising earnings report on the horizon.

india_trends.title: Replace LPG with PNG in crew resting rooms due to West Asia crisis: Railways to Zones
india_trends.summary: Indian Railways is embarking on a transformative journey by adopting piped natural gas for its crew resting facilities. This strategic shift is designed to cut down on LPG usage and simplify logistical hurdles faced by the organization.

india_trends.title: US Fed expected to keep rates steady as Iran war effects ripple
india_trends.summary: The US Federal Reserve opened its two-day meeting on Tuesday with policymakers expected to keep interest rates steady, as the war on Iran's effects on energy prices and supply chains ripple through the world's largest economy.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: Oracle, CoreWeave lead AI selloff on OpenAI growth concerns
india_trends.summary: Shares of AI companies fell on Tuesday. OpenAI reportedly missed user and revenue goals. This has sparked worries about its ability to fund future computing needs. india_trends.title: IAS launches ‘Total TV’ suite to bring linear-style transparency to CTV advertising
india_trends.summary: Integral Ad Science has launched a new solution called IAS Total TV. This aims to bring much-needed transparency to connected TV advertising. It offers marketers detailed insights into where their ads appear across major streaming platforms. This development addresses a key challenge as advertisers

india_trends.title: ReBid launches agentic AI-powered tool to benchmark creative performance
india_trends.summary: ReBid introduces a new AI tool to help brands understand competitor advertising. This technology analyzes ads across platforms like Meta and Google. It helps marketers benchmark their messages and create better ads. The tool automates competitor tracking, saving time. Brands can now make faster, sma

india_trends.title: Commodity Radar: Gold in a sideways trend after a 26% correction from its peak; warrants a sell-on-rise strategy
india_trends.summary: Gold prices remain range-bound after a sharp correction, showing weak momentum amid global uncertainty and upcoming Fed policy cues. Technical indicators suggest resistance on rallies, with analysts recommending a cautious sell-on-rise strategy as downside risks persist in the near term.

india_trends.title: Global stocks: BYD Q1 profit falls 55%, steepest drop in 6 years as China sales falter
india_trends.summary: Chinese electric vehicle maker BYD's quarterly profit fell at its fastest pace since 2020, a stock market filing showed on Tuesday, hit by sluggish sales at home and intensifying competition.
